name: seed corpus: L-5 two-pass reconciler reads seed/pr-corpus-patterns/patterns.jsonl as the held-out calibration set for threshold tuning
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --calibrate-thresholds 2>out.txt && grep -E 'using seed corpus.*20 patterns' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
